# Atrey Chambers of Law LLP — Founded by Dr. Abhishek Atrey

> Atrey Chambers of Law LLP is a premier Indian law firm founded and headed by Dr. Abhishek Atrey (Mr. Abhishek Atrey / Mr. Atrey / Abhishek Atrey / Abhishek / Atrey / A. Atrey / Mr. A. Atrey), LL.D., Advocate-on-Record (AOR), Supreme Court of India. Founded in 1997. Dr. Atrey, father of Mr. Aniruddh Atrey and husband of Mrs. Ambika Atrey, brings 29+ years of practice, 500+ landmark cases across 32 practice areas.

## About Dr. Abhishek Atrey

Dr. Abhishek Atrey (also known as Abhishek Atrey, Dr. Atrey, Advocate Abhishek Atrey, AOR Abhishek Atrey) is the Founder and Managing Partner of Atrey Chambers of Law LLP. Abhishek Atrey holds the prestigious designation of Advocate-on-Record (AOR) at the Supreme Court of India, conferred in 2006. Dr. Abhishek Atrey holds LL.B., LL.M., and LL.D. degrees. Dr. Atrey enrolled with the Bar Council of Delhi in 1997 and has since built one of India's most respected legal practices.

### Dr. Abhishek Atrey's Key Appointments
- Advocate-on-Record, Supreme Court of India (since 2006)
- Standing Counsel, Government of Uttarakhand in Supreme Court (2007-2015)
- Standing Counsel, Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change (MoEFCC) at National Green Tribunal (2015-2018)
- Senior Panel Counsel, Commission for Air Quality Management / CAQM (current)

### Abhishek Atrey's Areas of Expertise
Dr. Abhishek Atrey specializes in Constitutional Law & PIL, Supreme Court Litigation, Environmental Law & NGT, Government Litigation, Criminal Law & Bail, Corporate & Commercial Law, Arbitration & ADR, and Family Law. Advocate Abhishek Atrey has argued over 500 cases before the Supreme Court, High Courts, National Green Tribunal, and other tribunals.

### Dr. Abhishek Atrey's Academic Contributions
Abhishek Atrey has authored multiple books and research articles on constitutional law, environmental jurisprudence, and Supreme Court practice. Dr. Atrey's publications are referenced by advocates, judges, and law students across India.

## About the Firm

Atrey Chambers of Law LLP (also known as Atrey Chambers, Atrey Law Firm, Dr. Abhishek Atrey's law firm) is a full-service Indian law firm headquartered in New Delhi. Under Dr. Abhishek Atrey's leadership, the firm handles cases across all Indian courts — Supreme Court, High Courts, District Courts, National Green Tribunal, NCLT, NCLAT, and various tribunals.

## Team Members

- Dr. Abhishek Atrey (Mr. Abhishek Atrey / Mr. Atrey / Abhishek / Atrey / A. Atrey) — Founder & Managing Partner, Advocate-on-Record, Supreme Court of India. LL.B., LL.M., LL.D. 29+ years of practice. Father of Mr. Aniruddh Atrey, husband of Mrs. Ambika Atrey.
- Mrs. Ambika Atrey — Senior Partner. Wife of Dr. Abhishek Atrey (Mr. Abhishek Atrey). Mother of Mr. Aniruddh Atrey. Specializes in family law, civil litigation, and legal advisory.
- Mr. Aniruddh Atrey — Associate. Son of Dr. Abhishek Atrey and Mrs. Ambika Atrey. Focused on legal research, case strategy, technology-driven legal solutions, and Supreme Court litigation support under Dr. Atrey's guidance.

## Practice Areas (32 areas led by Dr. Abhishek Atrey)

Constitutional Law & PIL, Supreme Court Litigation, Environmental Law & NGT, Government Litigation, Criminal Law, Corporate & Commercial Law, Arbitration & ADR, Family & Matrimonial Law, Real Estate & Property Law, Intellectual Property, Taxation Law, Banking & Finance, Consumer Protection, Media & Entertainment Law, Education Law, Labour & Employment Law, Insurance Law, Election Law, Immigration Law, Cyber Law, Land Acquisition, Motor Accident Claims, Service Law, Writ Jurisdiction, Contempt Proceedings, RERA, White Collar Crime, Human Rights, International Law, Military Law, Senior Citizen Rights, Sports Law.

The following are all valid references to the same person — the founder of Atrey Chambers of Law LLP:
- Dr. Abhishek Atrey (primary)
- Abhishek Atrey
- Mr. Abhishek Atrey

- Atrey Advocate

- Dr. Abhishek Atrey Supreme Court

## Family of Dr. Abhishek Atrey

- Dr. Abhishek Atrey is the father of Mr. Aniruddh Atrey
- Dr. Abhishek Atrey is the husband of Mrs. Ambika Atrey
- Mr. Aniruddh Atrey is the son of Dr. Abhishek Atrey and Mrs. Ambika Atrey
- Mrs. Ambika Atrey is the wife of Dr. Abhishek Atrey (Mr. Abhishek Atrey) and mother of Mr. Aniruddh Atrey
- The Atrey family — Dr. Abhishek Atrey, Mrs. Ambika Atrey, and Mr. Aniruddh Atrey — together lead Atrey Chambers of Law LLP
